kilauea_notices.title: HAWAIIAN VOLCANO OBSERVATORY DAILY UPDATE
kilauea_notices.message: HVO Kilauea ORANGE/WATCH - Precursory eruptions of sluggish lava from the south vent in Halemaʻumaʻu began at 5:41 p.m. HST on May 30.The forecast window for the onset of episode 48 fountains is between today and Monday (May 31-June 1).

mauna_loa_notices.title: HAWAIIAN VOLCANO OBSERVATORY MONTHLY UPDATE
mauna_loa_notices.message: HVO Haleakala GREEN/NORMAL - No activity of concern for Haleakalā.
